imagePrompts.prompt: Platform Goal: Create one image asset for both Pinterest and X. It must work as a Pinterest Pin cover and as an X image-hook post that can anchor a prompt thread. Hero Subject: adult East Asian woman in an opaque cream knit top and high-waisted midi skirt, calm clean natural look. Scene / Context: morning bedroom beside a made white bed and sheer curtains, soft window light, tasteful shoulder and waist line, non-explicit composition. Source Recipe Translation: morning bedroom lifestyle editorial portrait. Preserve these source mechanics: morning bedroom lifestyle editorial portrait; soft window light, white bedding, sheer curtains, realistic skin texture, restrained fashion styling, calm adult feminine mood, and a clean non-explicit bedroom environment. Composition: vertical 4:5 or 2:3 editorial lifestyle portrait with a strong central focal subject and clean negative space. Style Language: realistic soft morning lifestyle editorial photography, quiet adult feminine mood, natural skin texture, restrained fashion styling. Visible Text: no visible text. Restrictions: fictionalized social-safe version of the source prompt; adult-safe styling; real brands, logos, teams, and public-figure likenesses replaced with fictional/generic equivalents; adult subject only, fully opaque clothing, no lingerie, no exposed chest, no bare midriff, no erotic posing, no watermark, no random text, no real brand logo, no unauthorized celebrity likeness, no copied IP, no distorted anatomy, no clutter.
